title: Add workflow_dispatch and README status badges
description: Tag-push triggers occasionally drop when branch+tag are pushed together. Add workflow_dispatch as manual fallback (with tag-only guard so dispatching on a branch cannot cut a release). Add CI/Release/Latest-release/Run-release badges to README top so the user can monitor and trigger from the README.
close_reason: Pushed in e6a61da. Tag delete+restandalone-push confirmed the fix: Release workflow run 24959528841 is now in_progress on v1.0.0.

title: Add Windows release CI workflow
description: Add .github/workflows/release.yml that triggers on v* tags. Verifies pyproject version matches tag, runs all four quality gates (pytest + ruff check + ruff format --check + mypy), builds both onedir-zip and onefile-exe with PyInstaller, computes SHA256SUMS, generates release notes via git-cliff from conventional commits, updates CHANGELOG.md in repo, creates GitHub release with assets, auto-detects prereleases (-rc/-beta/-alpha). No code signing - SmartScreen warning in release notes.
close_reason: Release workflow landed in c20b4a0; full CI gates pass locally (ruff lint, ruff format, mypy strict, pytest 144/144). Will be exercised end-to-end on the next v* tag push.
